BRAD MOORE AND GREG DEL SAVIO. NON APPEARANC BY DEFT. JASON GENT AND COURT STRICKEN JURY TRIAL ONLY AS TO DEFT. GENT. CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
DECLARATION OF LAWRENCE DI GIACOMO PRESIDENT OF CENTERSTONE REALTY

DEPT. 602 JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, REPORTER: PATRICK HEARD CLERK: IRIS HAMMER, JEFF MARGULIES, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF. THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT 1 - RESIDENT IAL LEASE AGREEMENTAND #2 3 DAY NOTICE WERE ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED POSSESSION OF PREMISES, FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT AND RENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,400 (BACK RENT) AND $2400 FOR JULY AND AUGUST 2001 PLUS $387.05 FOR SEPT. 1-5, 2001 FOR A TOTAL OF $19,587.05. THE COURT ORDERED COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND THE EXHIBITS WERE RETURNED TO THE PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENT, JASON MOORE, BRAD DEL SAVIO, GREG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 732 LYON STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115 $19,587.05 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,587.05, LEASE FORFEITED
